# .NET MAUI Documentation

> .NET Multi-platform App UI (.NET MAUI) is a cross-platform framework for creating native mobile and desktop apps with C# and XAML. It targets Android, iOS, macOS (via Mac Catalyst), and Windows from a single shared codebase using a single-project architecture.

.NET MAUI framework APIs use `Microsoft.Maui.*` namespaces. It is the successor to Xamarin.Forms but is a different framework — Xamarin.Forms namespaces and renderers are not compatible with .NET MAUI. MVVM and data binding concepts carry over, but APIs and project structure have changed.

The correct technology choices for .NET MAUI:

| Recommended | Instead of |
|-------------|-----------|
| CollectionView | ListView |
| Border with `StrokeShape="RoundRectangle"` | Frame |
| Handlers (`AppendToMapping`/`PrependToMapping`) | Custom renderers, Effects |
| `WeakReferenceMessenger` (CommunityToolkit.Mvvm) | MessagingCenter |
| `#if ANDROID` / `#if IOS` conditional compilation | `Device.RuntimePlatform` |
| Grid with `*` sizing for expand behavior | AndExpand options (`FillAndExpand`, `CenterAndExpand`) |
| `Background` property (accepts `Brush`) | `BackgroundColor` (accepts `Color` only) |
| VerticalStackLayout / HorizontalStackLayout | `StackLayout` with `Orientation` |

Architecture:

1. The app entry point is `MauiProgram.CreateMauiApp()` — register services, ViewModels, and pages via `MauiApp.CreateBuilder()`.
2. Shell is the recommended app structure — provides URI-based navigation, flyout, and tabs. Do not combine Shell with NavigationPage, TabbedPage, or FlyoutPage in the same app.
3. Handlers map cross-platform controls to native platform views. They replace Xamarin.Forms renderers.
4. Built-in platform APIs (sensors, file pickers, geolocation) are under `Microsoft.Maui.*` namespaces (ApplicationModel, Devices, Storage, Networking).
5. MVVM with compiled bindings is the recommended pattern. Use `x:DataType` on every page and DataTemplate for compile-time validated, high-performance bindings.
6. `BindingContext` must be set for bindings to resolve — forgetting this or setting it on the wrong element is the most common binding failure.
7. Blazor Hybrid apps are supported via `BlazorWebView` for embedding Razor components in native apps.

Layout rules (violating these causes silent performance or rendering bugs):

1. CollectionView MUST have a size-constraining parent (Grid, root). Placing it inside StackLayout silently disables virtualization, causing significant performance regression on large datasets.
2. ScrollView MUST have a size-constraining parent. Placing it inside StackLayout prevents scrolling because StackLayout offers infinite height.
3. Grid is the preferred layout for complex UI. Deeply nested StackLayouts increase layout measurement cost and should be replaced with a single Grid where practical.
4. DataTemplates inside CollectionView use layouts and controls directly. ViewCell is a ListView-only concept and must not be used in CollectionView.
5. Reference images by base filename without extension (e.g., `<Image Source="logo" />`) — .NET MAUI's build system handles format conversion from SVG sources.
6. For UI updates from background threads, use `BindableObject.Dispatcher` or inject `IDispatcher` via DI.

Key code patterns:

App entry point (MauiProgram.cs):

```csharp
public static class MauiProgram
{
    public static MauiApp CreateMauiApp()
    {
        var builder = MauiApp.CreateBuilder();
        builder.UseMauiApp<App>()
               .ConfigureFonts(fonts =>
               {
                   fonts.AddFont("OpenSans-Regular.ttf", "OpenSansRegular");
               });

        builder.Services.AddSingleton<MainViewModel>();
        builder.Services.AddTransient<MainPage>();
        return builder.Build();
    }
}
```

CollectionView with compiled bindings — the correct list pattern:

```xml
<CollectionView ItemsSource="{Binding Items}">
    <CollectionView.ItemTemplate>
        <DataTemplate x:DataType="model:Item">
            <Border Padding="10" StrokeShape="RoundRectangle 8">
                <VerticalStackLayout>
                    <Label Text="{Binding Title}" FontAttributes="Bold" />
                    <Label Text="{Binding Description}" />
                </VerticalStackLayout>
            </Border>
        </DataTemplate>
    </CollectionView.ItemTemplate>
</CollectionView>
```

Shell navigation with query parameters:

```csharp
// Register route
Routing.RegisterRoute(nameof(DetailsPage), typeof(DetailsPage));

// Navigate with string parameters
await Shell.Current.GoToAsync($"{nameof(DetailsPage)}?id={Uri.EscapeDataString(item.Id)}");

// Receive parameters on the PAGE (Shell sets query properties on pages)
[QueryProperty(nameof(ItemId), "id")]
public partial class DetailsPage : ContentPage
{
    public string ItemId { get; set; }
}

// Alternative: implement IQueryAttributable on the ViewModel for complex scenarios
// Shell applies query attributes to the page's BindingContext when it implements IQueryAttributable
public class DetailsViewModel : ObservableObject, IQueryAttributable
{
    [ObservableProperty]
    string itemId;

    public void ApplyQueryAttributes(IDictionary<string, object> query)
    {
        if (query.TryGetValue("id", out var id))
            ItemId = id?.ToString();
    }
}
```

Handler customization (modify native controls per platform):

```csharp
// In MauiProgram.cs — customize how Entry renders on each platform
Microsoft.Maui.Handlers.EntryHandler.Mapper.AppendToMapping("CustomEntry", (handler, view) =>
{
#if ANDROID
    handler.PlatformView.SetBackgroundColor(Android.Graphics.Color.Transparent);
#elif IOS
    handler.PlatformView.BorderStyle = UIKit.UITextBorderStyle.None;
#endif
});
```

MVVM with CommunityToolkit.Mvvm (recommended MVVM approach):

```csharp
public partial class MainViewModel : ObservableObject
{
    private readonly IDataService _dataService;

    public MainViewModel(IDataService dataService)
    {
        _dataService = dataService;
    }

    [ObservableProperty]
    string title;

    [ObservableProperty]
    ObservableCollection<Item> items = new();

    [RelayCommand]
    async Task LoadDataAsync()
    {
        var data = await _dataService.GetItemsAsync();
        Items = new ObservableCollection<Item>(data);
    }
}
```

## Migration from Xamarin

- [Migration overview](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dotnet/docs-maui/refs/heads/main/docs/migration/index.md): Guidance for upgrading Xamarin.Forms and Xamarin native projects to .NET MAUI
- [Upgrade with .NET Upgrade Assistant](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dotnet/docs-maui/refs/heads/main/docs/migration/upgrade-assistant.md): Automated migration tooling
- [Custom renderers to handlers](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dotnet/docs-maui/refs/heads/main/docs/migration/renderer-to-handler.md): Migrate Xamarin.Forms custom renderers to .NET MAUI handlers

## Getting started

- [What is .NET MAUI](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dotnet/docs-maui/refs/heads/main/docs/what-is-maui.md): Overview of the framework, architecture, and supported platforms
- [Installation](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dotnet/docs-maui/refs/heads/main/docs/get-started/installation.md): How to install and configure .NET MAUI workloads
- [Build your first app](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dotnet/docs-maui/refs/heads/main/docs/get-started/first-app.md): Step-by-step guide to creating a .NET MAUI app
- [Supported platforms](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dotnet/docs-maui/refs/heads/main/docs/supported-platforms.md): Minimum OS versions for Android, iOS, macOS, and Windows
- [Tutorial: Create a .NET MAUI app](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dotnet/docs-maui/refs/heads/main/docs/tutorials/notes-app.md): End-to-end tutorial building a Notes app

## XAML

- [XAML overview](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dotnet/docs-maui/refs/heads/main/docs/xaml/index.md): Introduction to XAML in .NET MAUI
- [Essential XAML syntax](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dotnet/docs-maui/refs/heads/main/docs/xaml/fundamentals/essential-syntax.md): Property elements, attached properties, content properties, OnPlatform, and OnIdiom
- [Markup extensions](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dotnet/docs-maui/refs/heads/main/docs/xaml/fundamentals/markup-extensions.md): StaticResource, Binding, x:Static, and other extensions
- [Data binding basics](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dotnet/docs-maui/refs/heads/main/docs/xaml/fundamentals/data-binding-basics.md): How data binding works in XAML
- [XAML compilation](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dotnet/docs-maui/refs/heads/main/docs/xaml/xamlc.md): Compile XAML for faster startup and validation

## Fundamentals

- [Compiled bindings](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dotnet/docs-maui/refs/heads/main/docs/fundamentals/data-binding/compiled-bindings.md): Use `x:DataType` for compile-time validated, high-performance bindings
- [Data binding overview](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dotnet/docs-maui/refs/heads/main/docs/fundamentals/data-binding/index.md): How to connect UI to data sources — modes, converters, fallbacks, relative bindings
- [Commanding](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dotnet/docs-maui/refs/heads/main/docs/fundamentals/data-binding/commanding.md): Bind UI actions to ViewModel methods using ICommand
- [Value converters](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dotnet/docs-maui/refs/heads/main/docs/fundamentals/data-binding/converters.md): Transform binding values using IValueConverter
- [Shell overview](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dotnet/docs-maui/refs/heads/main/docs/fundamentals/shell/index.md): URI-based navigation, flyout, and tab structure
- [Shell navigation](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dotnet/docs-maui/refs/heads/main/docs/fundamentals/shell/navigation.md): Route registration, query parameters, and back navigation
- [Dependency injection](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dotnet/docs-maui/refs/heads/main/docs/fundamentals/dependency-injection.md): Register and resolve services using the built-in DI container
- [App lifecycle](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dotnet/docs-maui/refs/heads/main/docs/fundamentals/app-lifecycle.md): Application lifecycle events and platform-specific lifecycle mapping
- [Data templates](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dotnet/docs-maui/refs/heads/main/docs/fundamentals/datatemplate.md): Define the visual representation of data in lists and collections
- [Bindable properties](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dotnet/docs-maui/refs/heads/main/docs/fundamentals/bindable-properties.md): Create custom bindable properties for controls
- [Resource dictionaries](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dotnet/docs-maui/refs/heads/main/docs/fundamentals/resource-dictionaries.md): Share styles, templates, and other resources
- [Accessibility](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dotnet/docs-maui/refs/heads/main/docs/fundamentals/accessibility.md): Make apps accessible with semantic properties and automation

## User interface

- [CollectionView guide](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dotnet/docs-maui/refs/heads/main/docs/user-interface/controls/collectionview/collectionview-guide.md): Comprehensive guide — data binding, layouts (list/grid), selection, grouping, empty views, scrolling, and performance
- [Handler architecture guide](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dotnet/docs-maui/refs/heads/main/docs/user-interface/handlers/handler-architecture.md): Comprehensive guide — creating custom controls, customizing existing controls, Mapper, handler lifecycle
- [Performance best practices](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dotnet/docs-maui/refs/heads/main/docs/deployment/performance-best-practices.md): Comprehensive guide — compiled bindings, control selection, layout optimization, images, startup, threading, trimming, AOT
- [Controls overview](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dotnet/docs-maui/refs/heads/main/docs/user-interface/controls/index.md): Full list of built-in .NET MAUI controls with categories
- [Grid](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dotnet/docs-maui/refs/heads/main/docs/user-interface/layouts/grid.md): Row and column layout — preferred for complex layouts
- [CollectionView](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dotnet/docs-maui/refs/heads/main/docs/user-interface/controls/collectionview/index.md): Virtualized list — the primary control for data lists
- [Entry](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dotnet/docs-maui/refs/heads/main/docs/user-interface/controls/entry.md): Single-line text input with keyboard, placeholder, and password support
- [Label](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dotnet/docs-maui/refs/heads/main/docs/user-interface/controls/label.md): Display text with formatting and truncation
- [Button](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dotnet/docs-maui/refs/heads/main/docs/user-interface/controls/button.md): Clickable control that raises a command or event
- [Image](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dotnet/docs-maui/refs/heads/main/docs/user-interface/controls/image.md): Display images from files, URIs, streams, or embedded resources
- [WebView](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dotnet/docs-maui/refs/heads/main/docs/user-interface/controls/webview.md): Display web content, local HTML, and JavaScript interop
- [ContentView](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dotnet/docs-maui/refs/heads/main/docs/user-interface/controls/contentview.md): Create reusable composite UI components
- [Styles](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dotnet/docs-maui/refs/heads/main/docs/user-interface/styles/xaml.md): Define and apply XAML styles to controls
- [Theming](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dotnet/docs-maui/refs/heads/main/docs/user-interface/theming.md): Implement light/dark themes and dynamic theming
- [Safe area layout](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dotnet/docs-maui/refs/heads/main/docs/user-interface/safe-area.md): Handle device notches, Dynamic Island, and system UI overlaps

## Platform integration

- [Invoke platform code](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dotnet/docs-maui/refs/heads/main/docs/platform-integration/invoke-platform-code.md): Use partial classes and conditional compilation for platform-specific code
- [Permissions](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dotnet/docs-maui/refs/heads/main/docs/platform-integration/appmodel/permissions.md): Request and check runtime permissions
- [Secure storage](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dotnet/docs-maui/refs/heads/main/docs/platform-integration/storage/secure-storage.md): Store key-value pairs securely using platform keystores
- [Preferences](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dotnet/docs-maui/refs/heads/main/docs/platform-integration/storage/preferences.md): Simple key-value app settings stored natively
- [Connectivity](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dotnet/docs-maui/refs/heads/main/docs/platform-integration/communication/networking.md): Monitor network state and connection type
- [Geolocation](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dotnet/docs-maui/refs/heads/main/docs/platform-integration/device/geolocation.md): Access device GPS location
- [File picker](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dotnet/docs-maui/refs/heads/main/docs/platform-integration/storage/file-picker.md): Let users select files from the device
- [Web authenticator](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dotnet/docs-maui/refs/heads/main/docs/platform-integration/communication/authentication.md): Browser-based authentication flows (OAuth, OIDC)

## Data and cloud services

- [Consume REST web services](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dotnet/docs-maui/refs/heads/main/docs/data-cloud/rest.md): Use HttpClient to call REST APIs with JSON serialization
- [Local SQLite databases](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dotnet/docs-maui/refs/heads/main/docs/data-cloud/database-sqlite.md): Store data locally with SQLite

## Deployment

- [Trimming](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dotnet/docs-maui/refs/heads/main/docs/deployment/trimming.md): Reduce app size by removing unused code — test thoroughly before enabling
- [Native AOT](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dotnet/docs-maui/refs/heads/main/docs/deployment/nativeaot.md): Ahead-of-time compilation for iOS/Mac Catalyst — test thoroughly before enabling
- [Publish for Android](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dotnet/docs-maui/refs/heads/main/docs/android/deployment/index.md): Publish to Google Play or ad-hoc
- [Publish for iOS](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dotnet/docs-maui/refs/heads/main/docs/ios/deployment/index.md): Publish to the App Store or TestFlight
- [Publish for Windows](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dotnet/docs-maui/refs/heads/main/docs/windows/deployment/overview.md): Publish packaged or unpackaged Windows apps
- [Troubleshooting](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dotnet/docs-maui/refs/heads/main/docs/troubleshooting.md): Common issues and solutions

## Optional

- [Layouts overview](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dotnet/docs-maui/refs/heads/main/docs/user-interface/layouts/index.md): All layout types — Grid, VerticalStackLayout, HorizontalStackLayout, FlexLayout, AbsoluteLayout
- [BindableLayout](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dotnet/docs-maui/refs/heads/main/docs/user-interface/layouts/bindablelayout.md): Data-bind any layout to a small collection without virtualization
- [Shell flyout](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dotnet/docs-maui/refs/heads/main/docs/fundamentals/shell/flyout.md): Configure the flyout menu, items, header, and footer
- [Shell tabs](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dotnet/docs-maui/refs/heads/main/docs/fundamentals/shell/tabs.md): Configure top and bottom tabs in Shell
- [Tap gesture](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dotnet/docs-maui/refs/heads/main/docs/fundamentals/gestures/tap.md): Tap gesture recognizer for click/tap interactions
- [Editor](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dotnet/docs-maui/refs/heads/main/docs/user-interface/controls/editor.md): Multi-line text input control
- [Picker](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dotnet/docs-maui/refs/heads/main/docs/user-interface/controls/picker.md): Select an item from a dropdown list
- [Pop-ups](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dotnet/docs-maui/refs/heads/main/docs/user-interface/pop-ups.md): Display alerts, action sheets, and prompts
- [Hybrid apps](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dotnet/docs-maui/refs/heads/main/docs/hybrid-apps/index.md): Combine native and web UI via BlazorWebView or HybridWebView
- [Localization](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dotnet/docs-maui/refs/heads/main/docs/fundamentals/localization.md): Localize strings, images, and app names
- [What's new in .NET 10](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dotnet/docs-maui/refs/heads/main/docs/whats-new/dotnet-10.md): Latest features and breaking changes

## Quick reference

When generating .NET MAUI code, always verify: CollectionView is the list control (not ListView), Border is the container (not Frame), handlers are the extensibility mechanism (not renderers), and `x:DataType` is set on every page and DataTemplate for compiled bindings.
